class DataPipeline:
    def __init__(self, source: str):
        self.source = source
        self._validate_source()

    def _validate_source(self):
        if not self.transformer:
            raise ValueError("transformer must be set before calling validate")
        if not self.destination:
            raise ValueError("destination must be set before calling validate")

    def set_transformer(self, transformer):
        self.transformer = transformer

    def set_destination(self, destination):
        self.destination = destination

    def run(self):
        data = self.extract(self.source)
        transformed = self.transformer.transform(data)
        self.destination.write(transformed)


pipeline = DataPipeline("s3://bucket/data")
pipeline.set_transformer(CsvTransformer())
pipeline.set_destination(PostgresDestination("conn_string"))
pipeline.run()
